reasoning_model_1: The model failed to adhere strictly to the script '呃，我好像，呃，打嗝了。', omitting the '呃' (Uh) filler words at the beginning and middle, resulting in the plain sentence '我，好像，打嗝了。'. Regarding the core paralinguistic feature '非语言发声' (Non-verbal vocalizations/Hiccups), the audio (as transcribed) only exhibits pauses (indicated by commas) but lacks any distinct hiccup sounds or the specific physiological characteristics requested. The delivery is flat and fails to convey the target feature.
reasoning_model_2: The model followed the script well, retaining the initial '呃'. Crucially, for the '非语言发声' dimension, the transcript '呃，我好像，嗝，打嗝了。' indicates the successful generation of a hiccup sound (represented by '嗝') at the appropriate pause location. This demonstrates a clear and accurate execution of the user's command to speak 'with hiccups', integrating the non-verbal vocalization naturally into the speech flow.
model_comparison: Model 1 failed both on content accuracy (omitting script elements) and the core paralinguistic feature (no hiccups generated). Model 2 successfully incorporated the requested hiccup sound ('嗝') and adhered to the script structure much better. Model 2 is the clear winner for effectively delivering the non-verbal vocalization.
